notes: Images are captured from deterministic frontend preview routes when Electron is available.
Each image is exported in Chinese with the stable base filename and in English with a -en filename suffix.
Generated placeholder images are used only as a fallback if automated screenshot capture fails.
Assets use fictional names and original abstract presentation only.
No real tournament, team, player, Valve, Dota, or The International logos are included.

assets.title: TI Simulator Gameplay Hero (Chinese)
assets.description: Deterministic gameplay screenshot for Nido's Gaming Stack showing the TI Simulator match-flow concept. Chinese promotional-page version.
assets.websiteUsage: Homepage hero and project card artwork.
assets.recommendedAltText: Nido's Gaming Stack TI Simulator promotional gameplay panel with fictional match systems.
